source_key: 19.1 Abstract algebra: symmetry becomes the object itself
title: Abstract algebra: symmetry becomes the object itself
role: Show symmetry patterns detached from any single geometric carrier.
prompt_core: Create a conceptual scene where concrete symmetries of shapes, equations, and transformations are distilled into a shared abstract pattern—like a crystalline network or operation table without text. The point is that the structure of composition itself has become the thing being studied. Modern, abstract, crisp, not decorative.
caption: Abstract algebra studies the structure of possible symmetries and compositions.
master_preamble: Create a visually sophisticated illustration for an adult mathematics book written for neurodivergent visual thinkers learning from first principles. The image must clarify the concept rather than merely decorate it. Favor spatial legibility, tactile materials, intellectually serious editorial art direction, and one dominant idea per frame. Keep geometry believable, lighting restrained, and enough quiet negative space for a caption or later overlay.
negative_block: No classroom clip art, no chalkboard wallpaper, no random floating equations, no childish mascots, no busy collage, no gibberish text, no impossible geometry, no decorative sci-fi fog, no glossy stock-photo students. If exact labels, axes, or theorem marks are needed, leave clean space for them to be overlaid later.
api_prompt:
Create a visually sophisticated illustration for an adult mathematics book written for neurodivergent visual thinkers learning from first principles. The image must clarify the concept rather than merely decorate it. Favor spatial legibility, tactile materials, intellectually serious editorial art direction, and one dominant idea per frame. Keep geometry believable, lighting restrained, and enough quiet negative space for a caption or later overlay.

Project context:
This image belongs to a rigorous adult mathematics book for neurodivergent visual thinkers.
It should function as a cognitive bridge for subsection "19.1 Abstract algebra: symmetry becomes the object itself".
Treat it as editorial art with pedagogical duty.

Image role:
Show symmetry patterns detached from any single geometric carrier.

Layout intent:
H — Half-page conceptual plate

Style direction:
symmetry-as-object plate

Core image brief:
Create a conceptual scene where concrete symmetries of shapes, equations, and transformations are distilled into a shared abstract pattern—like a crystalline network or operation table without text. The point is that the structure of composition itself has become the thing being studied. Modern, abstract, crisp, not decorative.

Caption intent for layout reference only:
Abstract algebra studies the structure of possible symmetries and compositions.

Overlay / production note:
No mandatory overlay note.

Rendering instructions:
Do not place explanatory typography, equations, or labels inside the art unless they are intrinsic physical objects in the scene.
Preserve clear compositional space for later book-layout overlays where appropriate.
Make the concept immediately graspable to an intelligent adult who distrusts rote schooling and learns through spatial pattern, tactile intuition, and elegant structure.
Keep the mood intellectually serious, lucid, and memorable rather than cute.

Negative constraints:
No classroom clip art, no chalkboard wallpaper, no random floating equations, no childish mascots, no busy collage, no gibberish text, no impossible geometry, no decorative sci-fi fog, no glossy stock-photo students. If exact labels, axes, or theorem marks are needed, leave clean space for them to be overlaid later.

title: Topology: sameness under continuous deformation
role: Make topological sameness feel like a new, gentler equivalence relation.
prompt_core: Show one shape slowly deforming into another without tearing or gluing, with continuity of the transformation foregrounded. The image should feel serious and elegant rather than novelty-driven. Use tangible surfaces and continuous motion traces so the learner feels what is preserved when rigid shape is no longer sacred.
caption: Topology changes the answer to 'what counts as the same?'
master_preamble: Create a visually sophisticated illustration for an adult mathematics book written for neurodivergent visual thinkers learning from first principles. source_key: 19.3 Differential geometry: calculus on curved spaces
title: Differential geometry: calculus on curved spaces
role: Show curvature, local flatness, and calculus living together.
prompt_core: Illustrate a smooth curved surface with a tiny tangent plane attached locally, and perhaps a path or field flowing across it. The image should make clear that locally the space can still look linear enough for calculus, even while globally it bends. Clean, luminous, concept-driven, quietly beautiful.
caption: Differential geometry asks calculus to live on curved worlds.

source_key: 19.4 Analysis: rigor about limit, approximation, and continuity
title: Analysis: rigor about limit, approximation, and continuity
role: Show analysis as the disciplined study of the refinement patterns already present throughout the book.
prompt_core: Create a spare conceptual image composed of nested intervals, convergent sequences, approximation layers, and continuity of curves, all gathered under one austere visual language of precision. The point is not symbol overload but disciplined limit-thinking as a whole domain. Elegant and almost monastic.
caption: Analysis is the culture of taking approximation and limit seriously.
master_preamble: Create a visually sophisticated illustration for an adult mathematics book written for neurodivergent visual thinkers learning from first principles. title: Probability, information, and computation
role: Connect modern mathematical thinking to uncertainty, encoding, and algorithmic process.
prompt_core: Design a contemporary image where probability clouds, encoded bit-like structures, and algorithmic flow diagrams share one coherent space. Avoid tech-bro cliché and glowing nonsense. The visual should suggest that modern mathematics studies pattern, uncertainty, and computation together in deep ways. Crisp, contemporary, intelligent.
caption: Modern mathematics also lives in information, uncertainty, and process.

source_key: 19.6 Why this modern map matters for a recovering learner
title: Why this modern map matters for a recovering learner
layout_label: Bridge plate / wide in-flow conceptual image
role: Emotionally reframe advanced math as a navigable atlas, not a wall of alien jargon.
prompt_core: Create a compassionate but serious image of a person or implied viewpoint standing before a richly connected map of mathematical territories—algebra, topology, geometry, analysis, probability—where paths and bridges are visible instead of a forbidding cliff. The tone should be dignifying and invitational, never childish or self-help-ish. This image is about restoring agency.
caption: Advanced mathematics is a landscape you can enter, not a wall built to exclude you.
master_preamble: Create a visually sophisticated illustration for an adult mathematics book written for neurodivergent visual thinkers learning from first principles. The image must clarify the concept rather than merely decorate it. Favor spatial legibility, tactile materials, intellectually serious editorial art direction, and one dominant idea per frame. Keep geometry believable, lighting restrained, and enough quiet negative space for a caption or later overlay.
negative_block: No classroom clip art, no chalkboard wallpaper, no random floating equations, no childish mascots, no busy collage, no gibberish text, no impossible geometry, no decorative sci-fi fog, no glossy stock-photo students. If exact labels, axes, or theorem marks are needed, leave clean space for them to be overlaid later.

title: Final thesis
layout_label: Bridge plate / wide in-flow conceptual image
role: Conclude with the book’s deepest claim: mathematics is organized by objects, transformations, and invariants across every scale.
prompt_core: Create a culminating synthesis image that gathers the book’s recurring motifs—segment, arrow, dilation rays, circle, graph, tangent, complex plane, spacetime grid—into one coherent constellation. The center of the composition should be the idea of invariance under transformation, with every chapter’s object orbiting it. Grand but disciplined, intellectually beautiful, emotionally earned.
caption: Across the whole book, the invariant under the right transformation becomes the real thing to understand.
master_preamble: Create a visually sophisticated illustration for an adult mathematics book written for neurodivergent visual thinkers learning from first principles. The image must clarify the concept rather than merely decorate it. Favor spatial legibility, tactile materials, intellectually serious editorial art direction, and one dominant idea per frame. Keep geometry believable, lighting restrained, and enough quiet negative space for a caption or later overlay.
